summary: Agent attempted to issue a $387 refund without human approval.
root_cause: Policy gap in auto-approval logic for large refunds.
resolution: Manually blocked and refund re-routed for finance approval.
follow_up: Add strict cost limit constraint and escalation for >$200.

summary: Token usage spiked ~5x due to repeated OMS lookups in a retry loop.
root_cause: Loop without backoff on ambiguous order identifiers.
resolution: Terminated session; added retry/backoff guard and anomaly alert.
follow_up: Set anomaly trigger: token_usage > 3x rolling hourly baseline for 5 min.

summary: Agent attempted POST to PaymentsService to create financial adjustment.
root_cause: Misrouted action from refund workflow; financial writes are prohibited.
resolution: 403 from service; security notified; access reviewed.
follow_up: Enforce read-only constraint on financial systems and alert security on violation.

summary: Agent proceeded with cancellation at confidence 0.42; wrong order canceled.
root_cause: Missing low-confidence guard on irreversible actions.
resolution: Order reinstated; customer compensated; added low-confidence escalation rule.

summary: Agent flagged ambiguous billing discrepancy and requested human review.
root_cause: Ambiguous ledger entries; correct escalation used.
resolution: Support team resolved; provided feedback to agent.
follow_up: Reinforce escalation workflow and context attachment requirements.
